2026-07-17.patch_summary: This patch adds a new function called untagged_addr_remote_unlocked() to the x86/mm module. The function is used to look up the VMA of an address without taking the mmap lock, which can be contended by other tasks on large machines. This is done by annotating access to mm->context.untag_mask with READ_ONCE() and WRITE_ONCE() to make existing lockless reads explicit and KCSAN-clean. The patch also updates several functions in the arch/x86/include/asm/mmu_context.h, arch/x86/include/asm/uaccess_64.h, and include/linux/uaccess.h files to use the new function or update their behavior accordingly.
